youtube.description:
Im barely even larping now at this point

Ive been making this type of content (drunk driving, TikTok reacts, Wii games) for a long time before this trend took off. Im not one of these impersonators Im a genuine creative that just hopped on a trend to get his foot in the door.

streams, stream highlights, offline recordings, gaming, irl, rants, podcasts, anything. im not doing multiple schlarpp channels all of my schlarpp activity is on this channel

Donations go towards content. 

 Main Channel and Twitch- @KiefferLIVE
